message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle bold
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderDashLength 0
skinparam participantBorderDashGap 0
skinparam participantBorderDashOffset 0
skinparam participantBorderDashArray 0
skinparam participantBorderDashPhase 0
skinparam participantBorderDashRepeat 0
skinparam participantBorderDashScale 1
skinparam participantBorderDashRotate 0
skinparam participantBorderDashSkew 0
skinparam participantBorderDashShear 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTransform 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTranslate 0
skinparam participantBorderDashScaleX 1
skinparam participantBorderDashScaleY 1
skinparam participantBorderDashScaleZ 1
skinparam participantBorderDashRotateX 0
skinparam participantBorderDashRotateY 0
skinparam participantBorderDashRotateZ 0
skinparam participantBorderDashSkewX 0
skinparam participantBorderDashSkewY 0
skinparam participantBorderDashSkewZ 0
skinparam participantBorderDashShearX 0
skinparam participantBorderDashShearY 0
skinparam participantBorderDashShearZ 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTransformX 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTransformY 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTransformZ 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTranslateX 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTranslateY 0
skinparam participantBorderDashTranslateZ 0

participant "Test System" as TS
participant "Engine under Test" as EUT
participant "Process Instance" as PI

TS -> PI: send input
PI --> TS: receive observable output
destroy PI

@enduml
